meta.title: Glulam Timber Houses Turnkey | Design & Construction
meta.description: Design, manufacturing and construction of energy-efficient glulam timber houses across Ukraine.

hero.label: In-house glulam timber production
hero.subtitle: Design, manufacturing and construction of energy-efficient glulam timber houses across Ukraine. From idea to keys — in 5 months.

items.title: Own Production
items.text: We control material quality at every stage — from timber drying to beam profiling.
items.details: Our production facility is equipped with modern European machinery. We independently source timber, perform kiln drying to an optimal 12% moisture content, profile beams with 0.1mm precision, and apply antiseptic treatment. Every batch undergoes quality control before shipping to the construction site.

items.title: Turnkey Construction
items.text: We handle design, production, construction and commissioning — all under one roof.
items.details: You receive a finished home without any hassle. We manage the project from the first meeting to key handover: architectural design, kit manufacturing, foundation, wall and roof assembly, engineering systems, and finishing. One contract, one dedicated manager, transparent pricing.

items.title: Real Projects
items.text: We have completed houses you can visit in person or view on video. No renders.
items.details: We have built over 50 houses across Ukraine and Europe. Each project is a real object you can visit and inspect. We don't work with renders — we only show what has already been built. We organize viewings for potential clients.

items.title: Expert Team
items.text: Our architects and engineers tailor every project to your site, budget and lifestyle.
items.details: Our team consists of 30+ specialists, each with over 5 years of experience in timber construction. Architects, structural engineers, MEP engineers, and builders work seamlessly at every stage. We continuously learn and implement the latest glulam construction technologies.

process.label: How We Work
process.heading:
From idea to finished
home in 5 steps

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: We discuss your wishes, budget and site specifics. Free of charge.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: Our architects create a custom project with a full set of documentation.

steps.title: Production
steps.text: We manufacture the house kit at our own facility with strict quality control.

steps.title: Construction
steps.text: Our experienced crew assembles the house on your site, turnkey.

steps.title: Handover
steps.text: We inspect quality, hand over the keys and provide a warranty on the house.

calculator.label: Cost Calculator
calculator.heading:
Calculate the cost
of your home
calculator.desc: Get an estimated cost for your glulam timber house. Exact quote — after a free consultation.
calculator.resultNote: Price is approximate. Exact quote — after a free consultation.
calculator.disclaimer: * Calculation is based on usable area (×0.85 of total). Timber up to 6 m — UAH 45,000/m³, over 6 m — UAH 47,000/m³ (standard up to 6 m assumed). 240 and 300 mm thickness — UAH 51,700/m³. Roof: gable, 20–30° pitch, area factor ×1.3 of house area, timber price UAH 1,320/m². Prices may change.

realObject.label: Our Real Project
realObject.heading:
A house you can
visit in person
realObject.desc: This glulam timber house was built for a real client. The client received a fully finished home from design to handover. Our own production and experienced team guarantee quality at every stage.

items.question: How much does a glulam timber house cost?
items.answer: The cost depends on area, specifications and project complexity. Starting price is from $350/m². We'll prepare an exact estimate after discussing your requirements.

items.question: What is the construction timeline?
items.answer: The average timeline from design to handover is 4–6 months. On-site assembly takes 2–4 weeks thanks to factory-ready components.

items.question: Does a timber house need additional insulation?
items.answer: Glulam timber from 180 mm thick provides sufficient insulation for year-round comfortable living. We can add external insulation if needed.

items.question: What warranty do you provide?
items.answer: Structural warranty — 10 years. Materials from our own production — 25 years. We also warrant all engineering systems.

items.question: Can I see completed projects?
items.answer: Yes, we arrange visits to our real projects. We also have detailed video tours of every construction stage.

items.question: Do you build across all of Ukraine?
items.answer: Yes, we build throughout Ukraine. Our own production allows us to deliver a house kit to any region.

objects.label: Our Projects
objects.heading: Completed Projects
objects.subtitle: Every house is a real object, built for real clients. No renders — only facts and quality.

projects.title: Modern Cottage with Terrace
projects.description: Single-story glulam timber house with a spacious terrace and panoramic windows. Modern design with natural materials.

projects.title: Guest House with Veranda
projects.description: Compact house with decorative painting and a cozy veranda. Perfect solution for a guest or summer house.

projects.title: Modern Cabin with Panoramic Glazing
projects.description: Stylish mini-house with large panoramic glazing and an open terrace. Modern architecture in a mountain landscape.

projects.title: Cottage Complex
projects.description: A complex of 12 identical cottages for a recreational resort. Dark staining, verandas and full autonomy for each house.

projects.title: Two-Story Family Home
projects.description: Spacious two-story home for a large family with a balcony and mansard floor. Classic timber construction style.

projects.title: Compact Homestead
projects.description: Small functional house for a dacha or guest use. Full set of amenities in a compact format.

privacy.metaDescription: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data on timberhouse.biz.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy describes how Sole Proprietor Sushchuk Vadym Volodymyrovych (Tax ID: 3191416031, registered in the Unified State Register of Legal Entities, Individual Entrepreneurs and Public Formations of Ukraine, entry No. 2 602 000 0000 013265 dated 13.02.2015, address: Rivne, Ukraine), hereinafter — "Company", "we", collects, processes, and stores personal data of users of the website timberhouse.biz (hereinafter — "Website").
By using the Website, you agree to the terms of this Policy. Personal data is processed in accordance with the Law of Ukraine "On Personal Data Protection" No. 2297-VI.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
paragraphs: We collect only the data you voluntarily provide through contact forms, as well as technical data for Website analytics:
list: Contact details: name, phone number, email — when you submit a request
Content of your message in the form
Technical data: IP address, device type, browser, operating system
Behavioral data: visited pages, time on site, referral source

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
list: Contacting you regarding your inquiry or request
Preparing a commercial proposal and cost estimation
Improving the Website and service quality
Analyzing the effectiveness of marketing campaigns

sections.heading: 4. Cookies and Analytics
paragraphs: We use cookies and web analytics services, including Google Analytics 4 and Google Ads. These services may set their own cookies to collect anonymized statistics about Website usage.
You can manage cookie consent through the banner on your first visit, or opt out of cookies at any time via your browser settings. Declining cookies will not affect your ability to submit a request.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing Data with Third Parties
paragraphs: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Data may be transferred only to:
list: Technical contractors (hosting, email services) — to ensure Website operation
Google LLC — for analytics (in anonymized form)
Law enforcement authorities — in cases provided by Ukrainian legislation

sections.heading: 6. Data Storage and Security
paragraphs: We store your personal data no longer than necessary to achieve processing purposes, but not more than 3 years from the last contact, unless otherwise required by law.
We apply technical and organizational measures to protect data from unauthorized access: HTTPS encryption, restricted employee access, and regular security system updates.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
paragraphs: In accordance with Ukrainian legislation, you have the right to:
list: Receive information about the processing of your personal data
Request clarification, correction, or deletion of your data
Withdraw consent to data processing at any time
File a complaint with the Ukrainian Parliament Commissioner for Human Rights

sections.heading: 8. Changes to the Policy
paragraphs: We reserve the right to make changes to this Policy. The current version is always available on this page with the date of the last update.

privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about the processing of your personal data or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us:
